title: Kapitel 8 - Bilder Check
description: Wissenscheck:  Das img-Element, src- und alt-Attribute und die Grundlagen von Bildpfaden.

explanations.overview: Das dicke wüste kesse glatte herrlich wild pralle weiche zarte The Src Attribute stiert formvollendet lüstern zäh kess weich auf the wüste glatte softe The Image Resource wild stramm kess dröhnend starr prasseld geil.

byOptionId.src: Correct â€” src specifies the image URL to load.
byOptionId.alt: Incorrect â€” alt provides alternative text, not the file path.
byOptionId.href: Incorrect â€” href is used for anchors, not image sources.
byOptionId.title: Incorrect â€” title offers tooltip text, not the image location.

explanations.overview: Alt text supports accessibility and provides fallback information.

byOptionId.accessibility: Correct â€” alt text helps assistive tech and shows when images fail to load.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect â€” alt is not for styling; CSS handles styles.
byOptionId.link: Incorrect â€” alt does not create links; <a> does that.
byOptionId.download: Incorrect â€” alt does not cause downloading of the image.
